title: WAN & SD-WAN Edge Health
value: We catch edge routers that stop forwarding before branch users open tickets.
description: Detects sustained packet loss and latency spikes on SD-WAN edge devices.
spl:
index=network sourcetype=cisco:sdwan:event status=down
| stats count by host
| where count > 0
implementation: Enable SD-WAN TA inputs and schedule every 15 minutes.
visualization: Single value for affected edges plus a trend line.
grandmaExplanation: We watch branch internet boxes and alert when they go quiet.
